kpis.name: Opposition progressive passes from defensive area %
kpis.description: Percentage of the opponent's passes originating from within the the player's defensive area that are successful, progressive and have an end location in the attacking half.
kpis.display_name: Opposition progressive passes from defensive area %

kpis.name: Opposition xG after defensive action
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG from the opponent's shots where the player had the last defensive action before the shot, and the shot occurred within 8 seconds of the action, measured per 100 opponent possessions that entered the player's defensive area.

kpis.name: Opposition xG from defensive area
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG from the opponent's shots that were a part of possessions that had a successful pass originating from within the player's defensive area within 6 seconds before the shot, measured per 100 opponent possessions that entered the player's defensive area.

kpis.name: Opposition xT from defensive area
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT per 100 successful opponent passes originating from within the player's defensive area.
